app.title: 3D Printing Brokerage
app.description: Generate 3D models with AI and get them printed

prompt.title: AI 3D Model Generation
prompt.placeholder: Describe the 3D model you want... (e.g., a cute cat figurine)

viewer.title: 3D Model Viewer
viewer.webglUnavailable: 3D viewer is not available on this device. Please download the STL file.
viewer.renderError: An error occurred while rendering the 3D model. Please download the STL file.

auth.dataProcessingAgree: I agree to the collection and use of personal data (required)
auth.consentRequired: You must agree to the required consent items

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.emptyModelsDescription: Create your first 3D model! AI will bring your ideas to life.
dashboard.emptyOrdersDescription: Generate a 3D model and order a print!
dashboard.loginDescription: Please log in to access your dashboard.

print.title: 3D Print Quotes
print.subtitle: Choose the best print provider for your model
print.noProviders: No print providers available at the moment

landing.subtitle: Generate 3D models from text and get them printed by the best providers — all in one place
landing.feature1Desc: Just type what you want and AI will automatically generate a high-quality 3D model
landing.feature2Desc: View your generated model in 360° directly in the browser
landing.feature3Desc: Compare prices and delivery times from multiple print providers at a glance
landing.step1Desc: Freely describe the 3D model you want to create
landing.step2Desc: AI analyzes your text and generates a high-quality 3D model
landing.step3Desc: Choose your preferred provider and order a print right away

error.pageDescription: There was a problem loading this page.
error.notFoundDescription: The page you requested does not exist or has been moved.

order.title: Order Confirmation
order.confirmDescription: Your order has been successfully placed
